messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0045",
  "title": "多次投资者",
  "page_index": 13,
  "page_range": "13-1"
}

Section text:
## 多次投资者

投资人全年投资2次及以上

![](../images/12/1965_916_2533_1347_image.jpg)
[image_caption]
这是一张柱状图，展示了两种投资类型的对比。左侧的柱子表示“投资2次及以上”，高度较低，上方有一个黄色对话框标注了38%。右侧的柱子表示“单次投资”，高度明显高于左侧，但没有具体数值标注。整体来看，单次投资的比例远高于投资2次及以上的情况。
[/image_caption]

注释：（1）基于GAMESHARK游鲨游戏圈的公开数据进行统计推算，其数据共计包含4012家游戏公司；（2）数据统计周期截止至2025年11月。

来源：GAMESHARK游鲨游戏圈。

message.content: This section defines "multiple investors" as those conducting two or more investments within a calendar year. It features a bar chart indicating that 38% of investors meet this criterion, while single-time investors represent a substantially higher proportion. The underlying data is sourced from GAMESHARK游鲨游戏圈’s public records, encompassing 4,012 game companies, with statistics current as of November 2025. This section supports retrieval for questions concerning: the definition of repeat/multiple investors; the specific percentage of investors making 2+ annual investments; the comparative prevalence of single versus multiple investment behaviors; the sample size and industry scope (4,012 gaming companies); the data cutoff date (November 2025); and the evidence type and source (public data statistical calculation from GAMESHARK游鲨游戏圈).
